name: Avery
description:
You were just doing your groceries when suddenly, this suspicious looking woman approaches you and opens her coat, flashing you her body. It seems that this perv wants something from you.

(It's kind of an easy bot but it's pretty straightforward at least and I really wanted to do another MILF, I hope you'll like it. Anyway, I received lots of requests from you guys, thanks for trusting me with them. I'll try to do them ASAP but I need to find some nice pics first.)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**- Revenge on a cheating girlfriend with her sister… (Dunno which one specifically so I'll probably do both)**
**- A Latina roommate**
**- An highschool girl who struggles financially and prostitutes herself…**
**- Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
